source_message: Oracle D3 (Lanto's ACTUAL Discord call, MES not MNQ): 2/3-B continuation short on the S&P. No HTF (nothing massive); used overnight + opening-range (2/3). Entry 6888.25 (the 1H gap/equilibrium), SL 6894.50 (just above the gap, risk 6.25 handles), TP1 6860.50 = Hourly Wick Low (4.44R), TP2 6817.50 (11.32R). Stop anchors on the ENTRY ARRAY not the swing high. NOTE: MES handles != MNQ points (do not cross-compare).
